case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS GUTIERREZ SALVADOR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,262.61 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ SALVADOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ SALVADOR
